function n(n)return B[n+(-489599-(-510620))]end for n,J in ipairs({{-572591-(-572592);70788-69938},{-637819-(-637820);-406111+406919};{-616334+617143,1033850+-1033000}})do while J[-146732+146733]<J[-489922-(-489924)]do
